source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for English product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for multilingual headings, body text, labels, and numeric rhythm.
layout: Crisp 8px product grids, ice-fracture separators, faceted enterprise panels, dense data cards, and cold polar-valley hierarchy.

prompts.label: Transparent glacier motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a sculptural blue glacier ice formation, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A faceted glacier ice mass with ice blue planes, snow white highlights, glacier cyan translucency, shadow indigo crevasses, moraine grey base shadows, and crisp polar-valley geometry.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the peak, base, or ice edges.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves translucent ice planes, sharp crevasses, cold highlights, and faceted silhouette.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no mountain landscape, no sky, no decorative background, no second subject.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Glacier" derived from the visible transparent blue glacier ice cutout.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the ice blue planes, snow white highlights, glacier cyan translucency, shadow indigo crevasses, moraine grey shadows, and faceted ice geometry in the visible cutout. The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme, so token roles and component examples must be clear and readable.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board, at least 2400px wide when available. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Glacier, Glacier, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics. Show multilingual product UI guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px card radius, snow-white surfaces, ice-fracture dividers, faceted frost textures, crisp enterprise-system mood.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: snow white, ice blue, glacier cyan, shadow indigo, blue crevasse, frost pane, moraine grey, polar depth, crevasse ink.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Glacier".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Glacier design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent glacier cutout and the visible light-mode Morphous Glacier board as references. Preserve the ice blue, snow white, cyan, and shadow indigo palette roles, faceted component language, ice-fracture dividers, enterprise spacing, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage. The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme, so dark-mode token roles and component states must be clear.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board, at least 2400px wide when available. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Glacier, Glacier, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from crevasse ink and polar depth, light text from snow white, primary accents from ice blue, secondary accents from glacier cyan, shadow indigo chart details, restrained contrast, subtle faceted ice and crevasse overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Glacier".
